title: FIGS Q3 2024 Financial Results Report
text: FIGS Nasdaq official earnings announcement for Q3 2024 showing net revenues declined 2% to $140.2 million missing analyst expectations. Net loss of $1.7 million with diluted EPS of -$0.01. Adjusted EBITDA dropped to $4.8 million (3.4% margin) from prior 17.2%. Active customers grew 4% to 2.7 million. Average order value decreased 5% to $108. Gross margin contracted 130 basis points to 67.1%. Inventory declined 14% YoY to $123.4 million. Free cash flow reached $18.4 million despite profitability pressures. Company successfully transitioned fulfillment center to Arizona increasing operational flexibility. International operations in 33 countries with Asia expansion focus. Management acknowledged controllable issues including footwear inventory and pricing impacted results. Full-year 2024 guidance adjusted to negative 1% to flat growth.
